infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Virtual Try-On uses your camera to take photos of yourself for virtual clothing try-on.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Virtual Try-On accesses your photo library to select photos of yourself and garments for virtual try-on.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Virtual Try-On saves generated try-on images to your photo library.

plugins.photosPermission: Virtual Try-On accesses your photos to select garments and personal photos for virtual try-on.
plugins.cameraPermission: Virtual Try-On uses your camera to take photos for virtual try-on.
